arts.ttl: Napoli Keeping Tabs on Bournemouth and Feyenoord Stars
arts.sum: Napoli have added two more names to their wish list to shore up the attack in the summer: Antoine Semenyo and Igor Paixao. They are both having an excellent season and are likely to wind up in a top team sooner rather than later.
